title: Road closed in both directions after crash
content:
A road was closed in both directions following a crash.

The A133 in Wivenhoe, Essex, was shut between the B1027 and Crockleford Road, in Elmstead Market this morning.

The closure was due to an earlier collision, the transport analytics company Inrix said.

The road reopened after the accident was cleared shortly after 09:00 BST.
